title: senecio pumilus
intro: Senecio pumilus, also known as dwarf fireweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio pumilus include its ability to reduce swelling and ease congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
